_comment: MMD arm rest pose measured from a real reference PMX (Purifier Inase 18 V1.pmx), so converted arms match real MMD models. *_dir = bone DIRECTION (upper_dir=腕.head->ひじ.head, fore_dir=ひじ.head->手首.head, wrist_dir=手首 tail/中指１ direction). *_roll_z = the bone's local Z axis (ROLL reference): a scalar bone.roll can't give a consistent world frame across bones pointing different ways, so roll is set with edit_bone.align_roll(this_Z). All in armature-local space (Blender right-handed Z-up), unit length. Step 1.6 (align_arms_to_canonical) aligns directions; complete.py aligns roll to *_roll_z.
source: measured from Purifier Inase 18 V1.pmx rest pose
